hero.title: Backpack Wander
hero.subtitle: Your partner for new paths
hero.services: Individual coaching | Web design | Digital strategy
hero.description: We support freelancers, expats, and visionaries in building their online businesses – authentic, multilingual, and future-oriented. We value clear strategies, creative freedom, and sustainable growth. Together, we design digital solutions that truly fit your needs. Your path to digital self-employment begins right here.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.paragraph1: We help people escape the 9-to-5 routine and create a flexible, fulfilling life in the digital space. Backpack Wander brings together coaching, creativity, and digital solutions – for you, your team, or your company. With a holistic approach, we support you in turning your visions into reality.
whatWeDo.paragraph2: Whether you're building your online business, developing a clear brand strategy, or designing your digital presence – we're at your side. Discover new paths, work remotely, and develop a business that truly suits you.
whatWeDo.imageAlt: Woman working remotely on a laptop

coaching.title: Business Coaching & Mentoring
coaching.description: Practical support for your digital project – from the idea to income.

webDesign.title: Web design & branding (via BW Digits)
webDesign.description: Tailor-made websites and visual appearances – multilingual & user-friendly.

digitalMarketing.title: Digital marketing strategy
digitalMarketing.description: SEO, social media, and email marketing: simple, human, and effective strategies that will grow your brand.

community.title: Community & Network
community.description: Through our WhatsApp group and scheduled retreats and workshops, we connect people who want to grow together.

workshops.title: Workshops & Retreats
workshops.description: Join our hands-on workshops and immersive retreats to learn, network, and grow with like-minded professionals.

visible.title: Make your idea visible
visible.description: Are you ready to escape the 9-to-5 everyday life and unleash your full potential in the digital space? We believe in a life full of freedom, flexibility and meaning. Whether you're an expat, self-employed or entrepreneur – we'll be with you every step of the way. With strategic coaching and proven digital solutions, we help you make your vision a reality and achieve financial independence from anywhere in the world.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Our goal is to build a global network of high-performing professionals who achieve financial independence and business success through strategic coaching and digital expertise. We enjoy connecting, helping, sharing knowledge, fostering friendship, and supporting each other.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Backpack Wander GmbH, our mission is to help people escape the 9-to-5 routine and live a life of freedom, flexibility, and purpose. We empower individuals to build digital businesses, work remotely, and live their lives on their own terms—from anywhere in the world.

coaching.title: Book a free coaching session
coaching.description: Unleash your potential – Free Get personalized support to clarify your vision, overcome challenges, and take your next big step with confidence. This no-obligation session is ideal for expats, freelancers, and aspiring entrepreneurs looking to grow.

appointment.title: Make an appointment
appointment.description: Would you prefer a personal consultation to find out how we can support you in your professional or personal development? Arrange a personalized consultation at a time that suits you. In a confidential conversation, we'll take the time to address your issues and develop initial solutions together. Take advantage of the opportunity to gain new perspectives and plan concrete next steps.

contact.contactUsSubtitle: Have questions or need assistance? We're here to help you plan your perfect adventure.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messageSent: Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon!
contact.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

footer.tagline: Your partner for new paths in digital business, coaching, and web design.
footer.newsletterText: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates and insights.

coaching.title: Practical support for your digital project – from the idea to income.
coaching.description: Transform your ideas into profitable digital ventures. Our business coaching provides tailored guidance to navigate the complexities of online entrepreneurship.

webDesign.title: Tailor-made websites and visual appearances – multilingual & user-friendly.
webDesign.description: Websites that captivate and convert visitors into loyal customers. We create beautiful, responsive websites that represent your brand authentically.

marketing.title: SEO, social media, and email marketing: simple, human, and effective strategies that will grow your brand.
marketing.description: Stand out in the digital landscape with strategies that deliver results. Our digital marketing approach combines SEO optimization, engaging social media campaigns, and targeted email marketing.

community.title: Through our WhatsApp group and scheduled retreats and workshops, we connect people who want to grow together.
community.description: Join a supportive network of like-minded entrepreneurs and visionaries. Our community brings together digital nomads, freelancers, and business owners who share knowledge.
